description: After the mind machine incident, Coulson is physically and mentally shaken, and Skye tries to keep him under observation as ordered by May. However, Coulson tricks Skye and locks her up, intent on handling the last known T.A.H.I.T.I. subject, Hank Thompson, himself. Meanwhile, May and Triplett deal with updates on Ward, and the team debates Coulson's condition and next steps.

transcript.line: I've seen some messed-up stuff in my day, turbo, but nothing quite like that. Holding down the director like he's possessed...
